ground_truth.title: Certificate in Accounting - Hunter College Continuing Education
ground_truth.main_content: The Accounting Certificate Program develops students' abilities to understand business transactions and financial statements and to determine the most appropriate financial measures for those events. Choose from a range of courses tailored to meet your specific professional goals. Earn professional credentials and accelerate your career with the critical skills you need to succeed in the industry. This program is approved by the National Association of Certified Public Bookkeepers (NACPB). Program duration: The program consists of 4 courses and can be completed in 2 or 3 semesters, depending on scheduling. Tuition: $2,650 plus a one-time $25 registration fee. Payment Plan: Down payment of $1,455 + 2 payments of $610. Courses include Bookkeeping I, Bookkeeping II, QuickBooks and Payroll Fundamentals, Intermediate Accounting I, and Intermediate Accounting II. Join us for an Open House for the Accounting Certificate on Wednesday, February 11, at 6:00 pm.
